description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named compiler-build that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should have a concurrency group based on the GitHub reference and cancel in-progress jobs if the reference is not master or a release branch. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: build-native, build-compiler, test-compiler, and upload-coverage. Each job runs on a matrix of different operating systems and configurations, and they involve setting up environments, installing dependencies, building, testing, and uploading artifacts.
